---
title: "Analysis of FTS data relating to Start flex Project - Statistical Analysis and Presentation"
author: "Naharajan Lakshmanaperumal, Senior Data Scientist, EMEA Field Trialing"
date: "11.07.2023"
output:
  slidy_presentation: default
  beamer_presentation: default
  pdf_document: default
  ioslides_presentation: default
  word_document:
    reference_docx: south_africa_variety_data_report_final.docx
always_allow_html: yes
---

# Contents

<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/emea_md_logo_3.PNG" width="50px" align="right"></div>
 
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/RZ_EMEA_Sign_Claim_Screen_RGB_on_white (1) (1).png" width="100px" align="right"></div>


- Data Summary

- Exploratory data analysis

- Statistical analysis 
  
- Discussion

<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/restricted.PNG" width="100px" align="right"></div>


# Start flex project - Project Summary


<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/emea_md_logo_3.PNG" width="50px" align="right"></div>
 
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/RZ_EMEA_Sign_Claim_Screen_RGB_on_white (1) (1).png" width="100px" align="right"></div>

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(multcompView)
#install.packages("lmerTest")
#install.packages("multcompView")
start_flex = read_csv("/mnt/data/Corn_trials_Romania_Hungary_2021_to_2023_data.csv")

filter_data = readxl::read_excel("/mnt/data/Copy of Start flex table.xlsx")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

DT::datatable(filter_data)
```

<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/restricted.PNG" width="100px" align="right"></div>




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
# FTS data transformation
#set unique ids for field, plot, set and trait
 
set_unique_ids = function(fts.df){
fts.df = fts.df%>% unite(trait, OBS_observationRefCd, OBS_observationName,OBS_uom,sep="_",remove=F)
 
#unique set name
 
fts.df = fts.df%>% unite(unique_set_name, SETS_setName, midas_field_id,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)
 
#unique plot name
 
fts.df = fts.df%>% unite(unique_plot_id, SETS_setName, midas_field_id,PLT_midasPlotId,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)
 
fts.df = fts.df%>% unite(unique_location_name, SETS_setName,FIELD_Location, FIELD_field_latitude,FIELD_field_longitude,FIELD_year,sep="_",remove=F)
 
return(fts.df)
 
}
 
start_flex_1 = set_unique_ids(start_flex)

 
#remove fts flags
 
remove_fts_flags = function(fts.df){
  fts.df = fts.df %>% filter(PLT_isPlotDeactivated=="FALSE")
  fts.df = fts.df %>% filter(REP_isAbandoned=="FALSE")
  fts.df = fts.df %>% filter(OBS_isDeactivated=="FALSE")
  fts.df = fts.df %>% filter(OBS_isDsrDeactivated=="FALSE")
  return(fts.df)
}
 
start_flex_2 = remove_fts_flags(start_flex_1)

 
# table(start_flex_2$REP_isRejected)
# table(start_flex_2$REP_isRelinquished)
# table(start_flex_2$REP_isMapped)
# table(start_flex_2$REP_isAbandoned)
# table(start_flex_2$OBS_isDeactivated)
# table(start_flex_2$OBS_isDsrDeactivated)
# table(start_flex_2$PLT_isPlotDeactivated)
#unique(start_flex_2$productName)
 
#convert csw sets to long format
 
convert_fts_csw_data_to_tidy_format = function(fts.df){
hybrids = fts.df %>% dplyr::select(FIELD_Country,FIELD_State,FIELD_County,FIELD_Location,FIELD_locationName,FIELD_field_latitude,FIELD_field_longitude,unique_location_name,midas_plot_id,midas_field_id,unique_plot_id,SETS_setName,FIELD_year,REP_repetitionNumber,productName,productBrand)

#hybrids = start_flex_2 %>% dplyr::select(FIELD_Country,FIELD_State,FIELD_County,FIELD_Location,FIELD_locationName,FIELD_field_latitude,FIELD_field_longitude,unique_location_name,midas_plot_id,midas_field_id,unique_plot_id,SETS_setName,FIELD_year,REP_repetitionNumber,productName,productBrand)
 
#hybrids = ssc_silage_2 %>% select(FIELD_Country,FIELD_State,FIELD_County,FIELD_Location,FIELD_locationName,FIELD_field_latitude,FIELD_field_longitude,unique_location_name,midas_plot_id,midas_field_id,unique_plot_id,TEST_SET_NAME,FIELD_year,REP_repetitionNumber,ENT_group1,ENT_group2,productName,productBrand)


 
 
traits = unique(fts.df[,c(8,73,81)])

#traits = unique(start_flex_2[,c(8,73,81)])
 
hybrids = unique(hybrids)
 
#silage_7= traits %>% filter(trait==traits$trait[1])
 
#silage_7_wide = silage_7 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
#silage_7_wide_1 = silage_7_wide[,c(80,82)]
 
#traits = filter(traits,!trait%in%c("COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating","PLOTUNI_Plot Uniformity_Rating", "EHT_Ear Height_Centimeters","HVPOP_SUB_Sub Sample - Harvest Population_1000 Plants/Hectare"))
plots.df=unique(traits$unique_plot_id)
plots.df= as.data.frame(plots.df)
names(plots.df) = "unique_plot_id"
all_traits = unique(traits$trait)
traits.df=data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(all_traits)){
  #i=10
  #print(all_traits[i])
  silage_8= traits %>% filter(trait==all_traits[i])
  silage_8 = silage_8 %>% group_by(trait,unique_plot_id) %>% summarise(OBS_numValue=mean(OBS_numValue,na.rm=T))
  silage_8_wide = silage_8 %>% spread(trait,OBS_numValue)
  silage_8_wide$trait = NULL
  silage_8_wide =unique(silage_8_wide)
  #silage_7_wide = silage_7_wide %>% left_join(silage_8)
  plots.df =left_join(plots.df,silage_8_wide)
  
 
}
 
final_tidy_data = inner_join(plots.df,hybrids)
final_tidy_data= unique(final_tidy_data)
 
return(final_tidy_data)
 
}

# needed_traits = c("COT")
# 
# start_flex_3 = filter(start_flex_2,OBS_observationRefCd %in% needed_traits)
# 
# table_cot = table(start_flex_3$unique_plot_id)
# table_cot=as.data.frame(table_cot)
#  
# start_flex_4 = convert_fts_csw_data_to_tidy_format(start_flex_3)


needed_traits = c("YLD","MST","COT","EVG")

start_flex_3 = filter(start_flex_2,OBS_observationRefCd %in% needed_traits)
 
start_flex_4 = convert_fts_csw_data_to_tidy_format(start_flex_3)

intresting_hybrids = c(filter_data$Comparison, filter_data$`Start Flex`)

start_flex_5 = filter(start_flex_4, productName %in% intresting_hybrids)

start_flex_5 = start_flex_5 %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(productName %in%filter_data$`Start Flex` ,"Start flex hybrid","Comparison"))
```


# Trial locations - Visualization in a map

- Trial data relating to Corn from FTS Apollo (from Crop Science Warehouse, CSW)

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
library(htmltools)
library(plotly)
library(crosstalk)
library(leaflet)
map_data = start_flex_1 %>% dplyr::select(FIELD_year,unique_set_name,unique_location_name,FIELD_Country,FIELD_locationName,FIELD_State,FIELD_County,FIELD_field_latitude,FIELD_field_longitude) %>% unique()
#gps_2 = unique(gps_1[,c(1,2,3,12,14,15)])
names(map_data)[8] = "latitude"
names(map_data)[9] = "longitude"
shared_gps <- SharedData$new(map_data)
bscols(widths = c(1,6,4),


  list(
        filter_checkbox("Year", "Season", shared_gps, ~as.factor(FIELD_year), inline = TRUE),
        filter_checkbox("Country", "Country", shared_gps, ~as.factor(FIELD_Country), inline = TRUE)
    
    #filter_slider("Mega Environment", "Mega Environment", shared_gps, ~as.factor(`Mega Environment`), width = "100%")
    #filter_select("auto", "Automatic", shared_gps, ~CSAM)
  ),
  #ggplotly(ggplot(shared_gps,aes(Country.x))+geom_bar()+facet_grid(~STAM.x,scales = "free_x")+ 
  #theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
  #       axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
  #       axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )),
  leaflet(shared_gps, width = "100%", height = 300) %>%
    addTiles() %>%
    addMarkers()
  ,
  DT::datatable(shared_gps, filter="top")
)
```

# FTS trial data - Summary

**Number of trials by country per season**

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
fts_summary = start_flex_1 %>% group_by(SETS_setName,protocolName,FIELD_Country,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials = length(unique(unique_location_name))) %>% arrange(FIELD_year)

DT::datatable(fts_summary)
```


**Number of hybrids tested by country per season**

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
fts_summary_1 = start_flex_1 %>% group_by(SETS_setName,protocolName,FIELD_Country,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_hybrids =length(unique(unique_location_name)), number_of_trials = length(unique(productName)))%>% arrange(FIELD_year)

DT::datatable(fts_summary_1)
```

**Star flex and comparison hybrids**

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

DT::datatable(filter_data)
```



# Calculating the raw CV per location for the yield observation

- The raw coefficient of variation (CV) is defined as the ratio of the standard deviation to the mean. It shows the extent of variability in relation to the mean of the population.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
fts_summary_1 = start_flex_4 %>% group_by(FIELD_Country,FIELD_year,unique_location_name) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare = mean(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare)*100)%>% arrange(FIELD_year)

fts_summary_1 = fts_summary_1 %>% mutate(high_cv_flag = ifelse(cv>=20, "TRUE","FALSE"))

DT::datatable(fts_summary_1, filter="top")

```

# Exploratory data analysis - Early vigor rating

**1-9:- 1-excellent and 9-bad**

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=20}
#install.packages("tidytext")
library(tidytext)
fts_summary_all = start_flex_5 %>%  group_by(productName,hybrid_type) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare = mean(`EVG_Early Vigor_Rating`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`EVG_Early Vigor_Rating`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare)*100)

#fts_summary_all = filter(fts_summary_all, FIELD_year!=2023)

plot_1 = ggplot(fts_summary_all,aes(reorder(productName,-mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare),mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare, fill=hybrid_type))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+ 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( angle=90,size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare-sd, ymax=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare+sd), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ylab("EVG_Early Vigor_Rating (1-9:- 1-excellent and 9-bad)")+ggtitle("Average EVG_Early Vigor_Rating across all locations")+xlab("Hybrid name")+
    scale_x_reordered()+coord_flip()
plot_1

fts_summary_1 = start_flex_5 %>% group_by(FIELD_year,productName,hybrid_type) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare = mean(`EVG_Early Vigor_Rating`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`EVG_Early Vigor_Rating`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare)*100)%>% arrange(FIELD_year)

#fts_summary_1 = filter(fts_summary_1, FIELD_year!=2023)

plot_1 = ggplot(fts_summary_1,aes(reorder_within(productName,-mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare,as.factor(FIELD_year)),mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare, fill=hybrid_type))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+ 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( angle=90,size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare-sd, ymax=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare+sd), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ylab("EVG_Early Vigor_Rating (1-9:- 1-excellent and 9-bad)")+ggtitle("Average EVG_Early Vigor_Rating across all locations")+xlab("Hybrid name")+facet_wrap(~FIELD_year,scales="free_y")+
    scale_x_reordered()+coord_flip()
plot_1



```


# Exploratory data analysis - Cold Tolerance Rating

**1-9:- 1-excellent and 9-bad**

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=20}
#install.packages("tidytext")
library(tidytext)
fts_summary_all = start_flex_5 %>%  group_by(productName,hybrid_type) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare = mean(`COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare)*100)

#fts_summary_all = filter(fts_summary_all, FIELD_year!=2023)

plot_1 = ggplot(fts_summary_all,aes(reorder(productName,-mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare),mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare, fill=hybrid_type))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+ 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( angle=90,size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare-sd, ymax=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare+sd), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ylab("COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating (1-9:- 1-excellent and 9-bad)")+ggtitle("Average COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating across all locations")+xlab("Hybrid name")+
    scale_x_reordered()+coord_flip()
plot_1

fts_summary_1 = start_flex_5 %>% group_by(FIELD_year,productName,hybrid_type) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare = mean(`COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare)*100)%>% arrange(FIELD_year)

#fts_summary_1 = filter(fts_summary_1, FIELD_year!=2023)

plot_1 = ggplot(fts_summary_1,aes(reorder_within(productName,-mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare,as.factor(FIELD_year)),mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare, fill=hybrid_type))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+ 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( angle=90,size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare-sd, ymax=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare+sd), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ylab("COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating (1-9:- 1-excellent and 9-bad)")+ggtitle("Average COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating across all locations")+xlab("Hybrid name")+facet_wrap(~FIELD_year,scales="free_y")+
    scale_x_reordered()+coord_flip()
plot_1



```


# Exploratory data analysis - Yield in quintals/hectare

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=20}
#install.packages("tidytext")
library(tidytext)
fts_summary_all = start_flex_5 %>% filter(FIELD_year!=2023) %>% group_by(productName,hybrid_type) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare = mean(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare)*100)

#fts_summary_all = filter(fts_summary_all, FIELD_year!=2023)

plot_1 = ggplot(fts_summary_all,aes(reorder(productName,mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare),mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare, fill=hybrid_type))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+ 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( angle=90,size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare-sd, ymax=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare+sd), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ylab("Yield (quintals/hectare)")+ggtitle("Average yield across all locations")+xlab("Hybrid name")+
    scale_x_reordered()+coord_flip()
plot_1

fts_summary_1 = start_flex_5 %>% group_by(FIELD_year,productName,hybrid_type) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare = mean(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare)*100)%>% arrange(FIELD_year)

fts_summary_1 = filter(fts_summary_1, FIELD_year!=2023)

plot_1 = ggplot(fts_summary_1,aes(reorder_within(productName,mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare,as.factor(FIELD_year)),mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare, fill=hybrid_type))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+ 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( angle=90,size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare-sd, ymax=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare+sd), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ylab("Yield (quintals/hectare)")+ggtitle("Average yield across all locations")+xlab("Hybrid name")+facet_wrap(~FIELD_year,scales="free_y")+
    scale_x_reordered()+coord_flip()
plot_1



```


# Exploratory data analysis - Moisture percent

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=20}
#install.packages("tidytext")
library(tidytext)
fts_summary_all = start_flex_5 %>% filter(FIELD_year!=2023) %>% group_by(productName,hybrid_type) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare = mean(`MST_Percent Moisture_Percent`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`MST_Percent Moisture_Percent`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare)*100)

#fts_summary_all = filter(fts_summary_all, FIELD_year!=2023)

plot_1 = ggplot(fts_summary_all,aes(reorder(productName,mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare),mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare, fill=hybrid_type))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+ 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( angle=90,size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare-sd, ymax=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare+sd), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ylab("MST_Percent Moisture_Percent")+ggtitle("Average moisture across all locations")+xlab("Hybrid name")+
    scale_x_reordered()+coord_flip()
plot_1

fts_summary_1 = start_flex_5 %>% group_by(FIELD_year,productName,hybrid_type) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare = mean(`MST_Percent Moisture_Percent`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`MST_Percent Moisture_Percent`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare)*100)%>% arrange(FIELD_year)

fts_summary_1 = filter(fts_summary_1, FIELD_year!=2023)

plot_1 = ggplot(fts_summary_1,aes(reorder_within(productName,mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare,as.factor(FIELD_year)),mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare, fill=hybrid_type))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+ 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( angle=90,size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare-sd, ymax=mean_field_yield_Quintals_per_Hectare+sd), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +ylab("MST_Percent Moisture_Percent")+ggtitle("Average moisture across all locations")+xlab("Hybrid name")+facet_wrap(~FIELD_year,scales="free_y")+
    scale_x_reordered()+coord_flip()
plot_1



```












```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
###Function which flags plot values with DSR > threshold for DSR traits 
library(lmerTest)
data_with_model_outlier_check_across_location = function(dataset, dsr.threshold){
  outlier.df = NULL
    traits= unique(dataset$trait)
 
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
  #dataset$id = seq(1,dim(dataset)[1],1)
    #print(traits[i])
  ## Subsetting only for the DSR trait
    temp = dataset %>% filter(trait == traits[i])
    temp = filter(temp, value!="NA")
    temp$row_number=rownames(temp)
  ## Subsetting based on missing data
    #temp = temp[temp$MissingDataFlag==FALSE,]
  
  ## Fitting the simple model
     model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ productName+ (1|unique_location_name), data = temp)
  
  
  ## Calculating Studentized residuals, and taking absolute values
    Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(model))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    temp = temp%>% left_join(sr.df)
    #temp = as.data.frame(cbind(temp,Stud.Residual))
    temp$trait = traits[i]
  
  ## Flagging DSR outlier based on threshold
    temp$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag = ifelse(abs(temp$Stud.Residual)>dsr.threshold,TRUE,FALSE)
  
  ## Merging with original dataset
  #temp = temp[,c("id","Stud.Residual","DSR_outlier_flag")]
  #dataset1 = merge(dataset,temp,by = "id", all.x = TRUE)
  #dataset1 = dataset1[,-1]
  outlier.df = rbind(outlier.df,temp)
  }
  return(outlier.df)
}
 
 
#by location
across_location_analysis = function(data_df_long){
  #traits = unique(data_df_long$trait)
traits= unique(data_df_long$trait)
 
  analysis_type="By location"
  means.df = NULL
  anova.df=NULL
  delta_table = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
    #print(traits[i])
    temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    temp = filter(temp, value!="NA")
    #temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    #temp_wide=temp %>% spread(trait, value)
      model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ productName+ (1|unique_location_name), data = temp)
    anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
    anova_table$Field = NULL
    anova_table$Trait= traits[i]
     anova_table$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$unique_location_name))
      #means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      #anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      lsm.df = create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new(model, temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      lsm.df$Field = NULL
    lsm.df$Trait= traits[i]
     lsm.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$unique_location_name))
      #lsm.df$Field = traits[i]
      #anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      delta.df = create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      delta.df$Field = NULL
    delta.df$Trait= traits[i]
    delta.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$unique_location_name))
      delta_table = rbind(delta_table,delta.df)
  }
  
return(list(means.df,anova.df,delta_table))
}
 
create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new = function(model,test.set,field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~productName)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$Protocol),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  names(lsm1.df)[1] = "Level"
  lsm1.df = data.frame(Factor,lsm1.df$Level,lsm1.df$lsmean,lsm1.df$SE,lsm1.df$df,lsm1.df$lower.CL,lsm1.df$upper.CL,lsm1.df$.group)
  names(lsm1.df) = c("Factor","Group1","lsmean","SE","DF","Lower_CI","Upper_CI","Group")
  lsm1.df$Field = field
  lsm1.df$analysis_type=analysis_type
  lsm1.df= lsm1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  return(lsm1.df)
}
 
create_anova_table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  anv = as.data.frame(anova(model))
  Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(model)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  anv$Field = location
  anv$analysis_type = analysis_type
  
anv = anv %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(`Pr(>F)`<0.05, "Significant","Not significant"))
#https://davidgohel.github.io/flextable/articles/format.html
#print(names(anv))
anv = anv[c(9,10,2,7:8)]
 # anova.table$Num.Fields = n.fields
#  anova.table$Trait = trait.name
  #colnames(anova.table) = c("Protocol","Effect","numDF","denDF","F-value","P-value","CV")
  #anv$field=field
  
  return(anv)
}
 
 
create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~productName)
  delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  
  ## separating contrast column to treatment 1 and treatment 2
  
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
  ## Parsing the Contrast column and generating the first and second columns
  # contrast.rcbd = as.character(delta1.df$contrast)
  # V1 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # V2 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # for(j in 1:dim(delta1.df)[1]){
  #   contrast.part = strsplit(contrast.rcbd[j]," - ")
  #   V1[j] = contrast.part[[1]][1]
  #   V2[j] = contrast.part[[1]][2]
  # }
  # delta1.df = data.frame(Protocol,Set,Factor,V1,V2,delta1.df$estimate,delta1.df$p.value) 
  # delta1.df$sig.1 = ifelse(delta1.df$delta1.df.p.value<0.1,TRUE,FALSE)
  # names(delta1.df) = c("Protocol","Set","Factor","V1","V2","Diff","Pvalue","Sig_At_10percent")
  #delta1.df$Observation = field
  delta1.df$Field=field
  delta1.df$analysis_type = analysis_type
  return(delta1.df)
}
 
 
 
 
plot_lsmeans = function(lsm1_df){
names(lsm1_df)[7]="group"
lsm1_df= lsm1_df %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsm1_df= lsm1_df %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsm1_df$group = as.factor(lsm1_df$Group)
lsm1_df= lsm1_df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsm1_df,aes(reorder(Group1,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean), position=pd, vjust=0.005, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+facet_wrap(~Trait, scales="free")+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9))
print(plot_lsmeans)
  
}
```



# Statistical analysis workflow
 
Step 1:- Statistical model outlier detection to detect the outliers
 
    Model used: Linear mixed effect model (LME) in R
 
    Fixed variable: Hybrid
 
    Random variables: Location
 
    Outlier threshold :- Studentized residual of +-3.5
 
Step 2:- Across location statistical analysis to look for significant differences between the different hybrids 
 
    Model used: Linear mixed effect model (LME) in R
 
    Fixed variable: Hybrid
 
    Random variables: Location
 
### Outlier analysis 
 
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
start_flex_5_long = start_flex_5 %>% gather(trait, value, 2:5)
 
#all_disease_long = all_disease_long%>% unite(trait,assessment_timing,type, sep="__", remove=F)
 
#all_disease_long_goe1 = filter(all_disease_long, location =="GOE1")
 
outlier_df= data_with_model_outlier_check_across_location(start_flex_5_long,3.5)
 
table(outlier_df$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)
 
DT::datatable(outlier_df, filter="top")
```
 
 
# Across location analysis - COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=15}
final_results = across_location_analysis(outlier_df)
 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(final_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(final_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(final_results[3])
 
DT::datatable(anova_results)
 
DT::datatable(lsmeans_results, extensions = "Buttons", 
             options = list(paging = TRUE,
                            scrollX=TRUE, 
                            searching = TRUE,
                            ordering = TRUE,
                            dom = 'Bfrtip',
                            buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf'),
                            pageLength=5, 
                            lengthMenu=c(3,5,10) ))
 
DT::datatable(contrast_results, extensions = "Buttons", 
             options = list(paging = TRUE,
                            scrollX=TRUE, 
                            searching = TRUE,
                            ordering = TRUE,
                            dom = 'Bfrtip',
                            buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf'),
                            pageLength=5, 
                            lengthMenu=c(3,5,10) ))
library(stringr)
 


lsmeans_results_ps = filter(lsmeans_results, Trait =="COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating")
#plot=plot_lsmeans(lsmeans_results_ps)
#plot+facet_grid(~timing)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$Group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder(Group1,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=Group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean), position=pd, vjust=0.005, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+facet_wrap(~Trait, scales="free")+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab("LSMeans - COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating")
plot_lsmeans
```


# Across location analysis - Early Vigor rating (EVG)

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=15}
lsmeans_results_ps = filter(lsmeans_results, Trait =="EVG_Early Vigor_Rating" )
#plot=plot_lsmeans(lsmeans_results_ps)
#plot+facet_grid(~timing)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$Group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder(Group1,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=Group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean), position=pd, vjust=0.005, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+facet_wrap(~Trait, scales="free")+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab("EVG_Early Vigor_Rating")
plot_lsmeans
```


# Across location analysis - Yield

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=15}
lsmeans_results_ps = filter(lsmeans_results, Trait =="YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare")
#plot=plot_lsmeans(lsmeans_results_ps)
#plot+facet_grid(~timing)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$Group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder(Group1,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=Group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean), position=pd, vjust=0.005, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+facet_wrap(~Trait, scales="free")+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab("YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare")
plot_lsmeans
```


# Across location analysis - Moisture
 
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=15}
#install.packages("multcompView")
#library(MuMIn)
 
 

 
 
 






lsmeans_results_ps = filter(lsmeans_results, Trait =="MST_Percent Moisture_Percent" )
#plot=plot_lsmeans(lsmeans_results_ps)
#plot+facet_grid(~timing)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$Group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder(Group1,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=Group))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean), position=pd, vjust=0.005, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+facet_wrap(~Trait, scales="free")+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab("MST_Percent Moisture_Percent")
plot_lsmeans
```

# Hybrid ranking per trait

- Assigning ranks to hybrids (1-7) based on the statistical lsmeans for all 4 traits

  1) COT  
  2) EVG  
  3) YLD  
  4) MST  

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(trait_type = ifelse(Trait %in% c("BDMG","BDMG_SESACA","EROTP","ERT","EVG","FFR","INT","LWR","MST","NLB","ON2","RTLP","S50D","STGR","STLP","STRP","TDPP","ON2","LWR","PAH","FERE","COT","COT_Cold Tolerance_Rating","MST_Percent Moisture_Percent","EVG_Early Vigor_Rating" ),"negative","positive"))


assign_hybrid_rank = function(lsmeans.df){
  lsmeans_final=data.frame()
  cohort_traits = unique(lsmeans.df$Trait)
  for (i in 1:length(cohort_traits)){
    #i=1
    cohort_traits_1 = cohort_traits[i]
    lsmeans.df_subset = filter(lsmeans.df, Trait==cohort_traits_1)
    if (lsmeans.df_subset$trait_type[1]=="negative"){
   lsmeans.df_subset = lsmeans.df_subset %>% mutate(cohort_mean=mean(lsmean,na.rm=T),hybrid_deviation_from_mean=lsmean-cohort_mean, hybrid_rank=rank(hybrid_deviation_from_mean),rank_bin=cut_interval(hybrid_rank,7),hybrid_scoring=rank(rank_bin),final_rank = dense_rank((hybrid_scoring)))
    }
    else if (lsmeans.df_subset$trait_type[1]=="positive"){
      lsmeans.df_subset = lsmeans.df_subset %>% mutate(cohort_mean=mean(lsmean,na.rm=T),hybrid_deviation_from_mean=lsmean-cohort_mean, hybrid_rank=rank(-hybrid_deviation_from_mean),rank_bin=cut_interval(hybrid_rank,7),hybrid_scoring=rank(rank_bin),final_rank = dense_rank((hybrid_scoring)))
      
    }
    
    lsmeans_final = rbind(lsmeans_final,lsmeans.df_subset)
  }
  return(lsmeans_final)
}
 
lsmeans_final_with_rank = assign_hybrid_rank(lsmeans_results)
lsmeans_final_with_rank = unique(lsmeans_final_with_rank)

DT::datatable(lsmeans_final_with_rank, extensions = "Buttons", 
             options = list(paging = TRUE,
                            scrollX=TRUE, 
                            searching = TRUE,
                            ordering = TRUE,
                            dom = 'Bfrtip',
                            buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf'),
                            pageLength=5, 
                            lengthMenu=c(3,5,10) ))


```


# Hybrid clustering using a machine learning clustering method: Hierarchical clustering
 
Hybrid clustering was performed using an unsupervised machine learning clustering method named "Hierarchichal clustering". Hierarchical clustering (also called hierarchical cluster analysis or HCA) is a method of cluster analysis that seeks to build a hierarchy of clusters
      
Distance claculation : Euclidean method
 
Linkage method : Complete linkage method
 
At each step, the two clusters separated by the shortest distance are combined. The definition of 'shortest distance' is what differentiates between the different agglomerative clustering methods. In complete-linkage clustering, the link between two clusters contains all element pairs, and the distance between clusters equals the distance between those two elements (one in each cluster) that are farthest away from each other. The shortest of these links that remains at any step causes the fusion of the two clusters whose elements are involved.
 
Reference: [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Complete-linkage_clustering)

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}


lsmeans_final_with_rank_2 = lsmeans_final_with_rank[,c(2,10,18)]
 
#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test = filter(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2,cohort==cohort_code)
 
#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test$cohort = NULL
 
lsmeans_final_with_rank_2 = unique(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2)
 
lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2 %>% spread(Trait,final_rank)


rownames(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1[,1]
lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 <- lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1[,-1]
 
autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
plot(cluster)
 
groups <- cutree(cluster, k=5) # cut tree into 5 clusters
# draw dendogram with red borders around the 5 clusters
rect.hclust(cluster, k=5, border="red")
 
#some_col_func <- function(n) rev(colorspace::heat_hcl(n, c = c(80, 30), l = c(30, 90), power = c(1/5, 1.5)))
dend <- as.dendrogram(cluster)
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1),  cluster_cols = FALSE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```
 
 
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1),  cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```
 
 

# Discussion

- FTS data from 2021 to 2023

- Statistically significant differences between the hybrids across all traits

- Potentially yield environment could be a confounding variable in the stat analysis



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
start_flex_4_ye = start_flex_4


start_flex_4_ye = start_flex_4_ye %>% filter(!is.na(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`))
ye_start_flex_4 = start_flex_4_ye %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield = mean(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield)*100)

ye_start_flex_4 = ye_start_flex_4 %>% mutate(ye_class = ifelse(mean_field_yield<70,"1:low ye (<7 t/ha)",ifelse(mean_field_yield>110,"3:High ye (>11 t/ha)","3:Mid ye (7-11 t/ha)")))

number_of_trials_per_obs = start_flex_4 %>% group_by(productName,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials = length(unique(unique_location_name)))

number_of_trials_per_obs = start_flex_4 %>% group_by(productName,productBrand) %>% summarise(number_of_trials = length(unique(unique_location_name)),number_of_seasons = length(unique(FIELD_year)))

number_of_trials_per_obs_pro = start_flex_5 %>% group_by(productName,productBrand) %>% summarise(number_of_trials = length(unique(unique_location_name)),number_of_seasons = length(unique(FIELD_year)))
```




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
ye_start_flex_4 = start_flex_4 %>% group_by(unique_location_name) %>% summarise(mean_field_yield = mean(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T), sd=sd(`YLD_Yield_Quintals/Hectare`,na.rm=T),cv=(sd/mean_field_yield)*100)

number_of_trials_per_obs = start_flex_4 %>% group_by(productName,FIELD_year) %>% summarise(number_of_trials = length(unique(unique_location_name)))

number_of_trials_per_obs = start_flex_4 %>% group_by(productName,productBrand) %>% summarise(number_of_trials = length(unique(unique_location_name)),number_of_seasons = length(unique(FIELD_year)))

number_of_trials_per_obs_pro = start_flex_5 %>% group_by(productName,productBrand) %>% summarise(number_of_trials = length(unique(unique_location_name)),number_of_seasons = length(unique(FIELD_year)))
```
